# pgpour

- purpose: Postgres CDC to Kafka real-time data pipeline via logical replication
- version: 0.1.0
- language: Rust (edition 2024, MSRV 1.88.0)
- based_on: supabase/etl

## Command Syntax

```
pgpour [--config <YAML>] --pg-host <HOST> --pg-database <DB> --pg-username <USER> [options]
```

## Core Arguments

- `--config <path>`: YAML config file (lowest priority, overridden by env/CLI)
- `--pg-host`: Postgres host (env: PG_HOST)
- `--pg-port`: Postgres port (default: 5432, env: PG_PORT)
- `--pg-database`: Database name (env: PG_DATABASE)
- `--pg-username`: Username with REPLICATION privilege (env: PG_USERNAME)
- `--pg-password`: Password (env: PG_PASSWORD)
- `--publication`: Publication name (default: cdc_publication, env: PG_PUBLICATION)

## SSH Tunnel Arguments (optional)

- `--pg-ssh-host`: Bastion host, enables tunnel when set (env: PG_SSH_HOST)
- `--pg-ssh-port`: SSH port (default: 22)
- `--pg-ssh-username`: SSH username
- `--pg-ssh-password`: SSH password
- `--pg-ssh-private-key-path`: SSH private key file
- `--pg-ssh-private-key-passphrase`: Key passphrase

## Kafka Arguments

- `--kafka-brokers`: Bootstrap servers (default: localhost:9092, env: KAFKA_BROKERS)
- `--kafka-topic-prefix`: Topic prefix (default: cdc, env: KAFKA_TOPIC_PREFIX)
- `--kafka-security-protocol`: plaintext|ssl|sasl_plaintext|sasl_ssl (default: plaintext)
- `--kafka-sasl-mechanism`: plain|scram-sha-256|scram-sha-512
- `--kafka-sasl-username`, `--kafka-sasl-password`: SASL credentials
- `--kafka-ssl-ca-location`: CA cert path
- `--kafka-ssl-certificate-location`: Client cert (mTLS)
- `--kafka-ssl-key-location`: Client key (mTLS)

## Tuning Arguments

- `--batch-max-fill-ms`: Batch fill duration ms (default: 5000)
- `--max-table-sync-workers`: Parallel sync workers (default: 4)

## Config Priority

CLI args > environment variables > YAML config file > defaults

## Message Format

```json
{"op": "insert|update|delete|sync", "table": "schema.table", "before": null, "after": {...}}
```

- Topic: `{prefix}.{schema}.{table}`
- Message key: primary key column values

## Prerequisites

- PostgreSQL 14+ with wal_level=logical
- User with REPLICATION privilege
- CREATE PUBLICATION for target tables

## Optional Features

- `--features metric`: OpenTelemetry OTLP metrics export (requires --otlp-endpoint)

## Build

```bash
cargo build --release
# or: docker compose up -d
```
